sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89183" key="prosepidii/stamai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπι-διίστᾰμαι</orth>, of the pulse, <sense id="n89183.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make another diastole</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0667.tlg001:421" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marcellin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Puls.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">421</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
